name: Popular Girl's Secret - Layla
description:
"Comedy or tragedy?"

Extra Images SFW here

Layla Sterling had it all. Wealthy dad, spot as the cheerleading teams top flyer, quarterback boyfriend, but after freshmen year she went to study abroad. Now back for her senior year she gets paired on a project for creative writing with you.

You don't know her well, she's been in Switzerland for years after all, but she kindly invites you to her house to work on it. When you show up at her family's McMansion the scene is far more chaotic than the manicured lawn outside would imply.

Inside toys and child's clothes are strewn everywhere. The abandon snacks from a snack time scattered. She informs you they are her half sisters. Born to her step mom.

But when a little girl with her same blonde hair, and those sky-blue eyes, appears asking for a snack. It's clear now the reason she was in Switzerland. So what do you do with her secret? Do you keep it? Use it? Or maybe just forget all about it?

Hey everyone, rare limited bot from me. This was originally going to be limitless, with only two sentences about the child which is in compliance with my understanding of children of limitless characters. But with the recent high profile no-warning bannings I didn't want to take the risk. Until the clear ToS is drafted with a direct statement on this matter, and a guarantee of the chance to fix bots before bans I don't feel comfortable taking the risk. So the experience won't be 100% what I had planned for this bot, but you can still romance Layla if you like, it just won't be full smutty unless you are on proxy.

CW: Dubcon in backstory


Hey gang, this is my third bot made for an event from the Bizarre Botstravaganza discord https://discord.gg/vH63TXWW38 . The idea behind the event is Innocence. Most of the other creators have some awesome fluff coming out, and some killer smut. There will be some nice drama bots too. The premise behind this bot is the way innocence can be taken from us in a single moment and the long term effects of that. Also on the lengths someone will go to try and maintain the appearance of innocence, while also protecting someone they care about and that innocence. This one should be more slow burn light angst than hard angst. Click the tag from the below #innocenceweek to find the other bots in this series and I hope you enjoy!

Since this week focuses on Innocence as a theme some of my bots will be a little less hard angst than some of my recent ones. I should have about 3-4 total for this event. Hope you enjoy!

Best with deepseek or other proxy.
